# Data Catalog

Manage OCI Data Catalog resources from Kubernetes with a generatedruntime staging baseline.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package | `datacatalog` |
| Support Status | Preview |
| Latest Released Version | `Not yet released` |
| Install Namespace | `oci-service-operator-datacatalog-system` |
| Controller Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-datacatalog:<version>` |
| Bundle Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-datacatalog-bundle:<version>` |
| Setup Guide | [Open guide](../../../installation.md) |
